children.onClick: {{storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', true); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', `Sending ${TableJobs.selectedRow && TableJobs.selectedRow.captain_name ? TableJobs.selectedRow.captain_name : 'selected captain'}...`); TriggerMailout.run(() => { SyncMailoutData.run(() => { storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Captain mailout sent.'); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert('Captain mailout sent', 'success'); }, (error) => { const message = `Mailout sent, but refresh failed: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); }); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}

{{storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', true); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Generating captain mailout bundle...'); GenerateOnly.run(() => { SyncMailoutData.run(() => { const count = Array.isArray(SyncMailoutData.data && SyncMailoutData.data.jobs) ? SyncMailoutData.data.jobs.length : (Array.isArray(SyncMailoutData.data && SyncMailoutData.data.body && SyncMailoutData.data.body.jobs) ? SyncMailoutData.data.body.jobs.length : 0); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', (GenerateOnly.data && GenerateOnly.data.message) || (GenerateOnly.data && GenerateOnly.data.body && GenerateOnly.data.body.message) || `Generated ${count} captain mailout job(s).`); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert('Captain mailout bundle generated', 'success'); }, (error) => { const message = `Generated bundle, but refresh failed: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); }); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}

actionConfiguration.body: SELECT * FROM public.email_templates ORDER BY template_name ASC;
SELECT * FROM public.email_templates ORDER BY template_name ASC;

unpublishedAction.name: SaveTemplate

actionConfiguration.body:
UPDATE public.email_templates
SET template_key = {{InputTemplateKey.text || ''}},
    template_name = {{InputTemplateName.text || ''}},
    template_type = {{(() => { const stored = appsmith.store.emailTemplateDraft?.template_type; const storedNum = Number(stored); if (Number.isFinite(storedNum)) return storedNum; const v = SelectTemplateType.selectedOptionValue; if (v === 'Email') return 0; if (v === 'Header') return 1; if (v === 'Signature') return 2; const n = Number(v); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; })()}},
    subject_template = {{InputSubject.text || null}},
    text_template = {{TextareaTextTemplate.text || null}},
    html_template = {{appsmith.store.emailTemplateLiveHtml || (typeof RichTextTemplate.text === 'string' ? RichTextTemplate.text : (TextareaHtmlTemplate.text || null))}},
    is_active = {{CheckboxIsActive.isChecked}},
    updated_at = now()
WHERE id = {{appsmith.store.selectedEmailTemplateId}};

jsonPathKeys: (() => { const stored = appsmith.store.emailTemplateDraft?.template_type; const storedNum = Number(stored); if (Number.isFinite(storedNum)) return storedNum; const v = SelectTemplateType.selectedOptionValue; if (v === 'Email') return 0; if (v === 'Header') return 1; if (v === 'Signature') return 2; const n = Number(v); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; })()

actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO public.email_templates (
  template_key,
  template_name,
  template_type,
  subject_template,
  text_template,
  html_template,
  is_active,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{InputTemplateKey.text || ''}},
  {{InputTemplateName.text || ''}},
  {{(() => { const stored = appsmith.store.emailTemplateDraft?.template_type; const storedNum = Number(stored); if (Number.isFinite(storedNum)) return storedNum; const v = SelectTemplateType.selectedOptionValue; if (v === 'Email') return 0; if (v === 'Header') return 1; if (v === 'Signature') return 2; const n = Number(v); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; })()}},
  {{InputSubject.text || null}},
  {{TextareaTextTemplate.text || null}},
  {{appsmith.store.emailTemplateLiveHtml || (typeof RichTextTemplate.text === 'string' ? RichTextTemplate.text : (TextareaHtmlTemplate.text || null))}},
  {{CheckboxIsActive.isChecked}},
  now(),
  now()
)
RETURNING id;

WITH raw_names AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address,
    'raw_members' AS source_table
  FROM public.raw_members
  WHERE is_current IS TRUE

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address,
    'raw_contacts' AS source_table
  FROM public.raw_contacts
  WHERE is_current IS TRUE
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    player_name,
    MAX(NULLIF(email_address, '')) AS email_address,
    string_agg(DISTINCT source_table, ', ' ORDER BY source_table) AS source_tables
  FROM raw_names
  WHERE player_name IS NOT NULL
    AND player_name <> ''
  GROUP BY player_name
)
SELECT
  player_name ||
    CASE WHEN email_address IS NOT NULL THEN ' (' || email_address || ')' ELSE '' END ||
    ' [' || source_tables || ']' AS label,
  player_name AS value,
  player_name,
  COALESCE(email_address, '') AS email_address,
  source_tables
FROM deduped
WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(COALESCE({{InputPlayerLookup.text}}, ''))) >= 2
  AND player_name ILIKE ('%' || TRIM(COALESCE({{InputPlayerLookup.text}}, '')) || '%')
ORDER BY player_name ASC
LIMIT 25;

WITH raw_names AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address,
    'raw_members' AS source_table
  FROM public.raw_members
  WHERE is_current IS TRUE

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', NULLIF(trim("First name"), ''), NULLIF(trim("Last name"), ''))) AS player_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim("Email address"), ''), '') AS email_address,
    'raw_contacts' AS source_table
  FROM public.raw_contacts
  WHERE is_current IS TRUE
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    player_name,
    MAX(NULLIF(email_address, '')) AS email_address,
    string_agg(DISTINCT source_table, ', ' ORDER BY source_table) AS source_tables
  FROM raw_names
  WHERE player_name IS NOT NULL
    AND player_name <> ''
  GROUP BY player_name
)
SELECT
  player_name ||
    CASE WHEN email_address IS NOT NULL THEN ' (' || email_address || ')' ELSE '' END ||
    ' [' || source_tables || ']' AS label,
  player_name AS value,
  player_name,
  COALESCE(email_address, '') AS email_address,
  source_tables
FROM deduped
WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(COALESCE({{InputPlayerLookup.text}}, ''))) >= 2
  AND player_name ILIKE ('%' || TRIM(COALESCE({{InputPlayerLookup.text}}, '')) || '%')
ORDER BY player_name ASC
LIMIT 25;
